question: Will the Oklahoma City Thunder win the 2026 NBA Finals?
textDescription: OKC enters the 2026 playoffs as the #1 overall seed and defending champions. The 2026 NBA Finals begin June 3, 2026. Sportsbooks have OKC at +115 to repeat (FanDuel as of mid-April). RESOLVES YES if the Oklahoma City Thunder win the 2026 NBA Finals (clinch four games in the championship series). RESOLVES NO if any other team wins the 2026 NBA Finals.
